HYPNOSISCREATOR-HC_DEFEND.title: Defend
HYPNOSISCREATOR-PLEASURE_CYCLE.title: Pleasure Cycle
HYPNOSISCREATOR-PLEASURE_CYCLE.descripti: Apply {Doom:diff()} [gold]Doom[/gold]. If the target has [gold]Trance[/gold], apply {Doom:diff()} [gold]Doom[/gold] again. Return this card to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
HYPNOSISCREATOR-FINGER_SNAP.title: Finger Snap
HYPNOSISCREATOR-HARMONY.title: Harmony
HYPNOSISCREATOR-HARMONY.description: Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the opponent's attack.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-MIRRORING.title: Mirroring
HYPNOSISCREATOR-MIRRORING.description: Perform the same attack the opponent intends to use.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-STUN_GUN.title: Stun Gun
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SAY_YOURE_SORRY.title: Say You're Sorry?
HYPNOSISCREATOR-WRIST_CUT.title: Wrist Cut
HYPNOSISCREATOR-BEGINNER_HYPNOSIS.title: Beginner Hypnosis
HYPNOSISCREATOR-BEGINNER_HYPNOSIS.descri: Apply {Doom:diff()} [gold]Doom[/gold]. Plant fetishes from the next {PlantCards:diff()} Fetish {PlantCards:plural:card|cards} played on the target. Apply {Trance:diff()} [gold]Trance[/gold].
HYPNOSISCREATOR-DEEP_BREATH.title: Deep Breath
HYPNOSISCREATOR-PREFINGER.title: Foreplay
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SENSITIVITY3000.title: Sensitivity x3.000
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SENSITIVITY3000.descript: Apply {Trance:diff()} [gold]Trance[/gold]. Always hits Fetish. This turn, the opponent takes [blue]3.000[/blue]× damage.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-BREATH_CONTROL.title: Breath Control
HYPNOSISCREATOR-BREATH_CONTROL.descripti: This turn, whenever you play a card, the target loses [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold]. If their attack value is [blue]0[/blue], [gold]Stun[/gold] them.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ZERO_OUT.title: Zero Out
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ZERO_OUT.description: Set their attack value to [blue]0[/blue]. Apply {Trance:diff()} [gold]Trance[/gold].
HYPNOSISCREATOR-DRUG_HYPNOSIS.title: Drug Hypnosis
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SPANKING.title: Spanking
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SPANKING.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage [blue]2[/blue] times. If Fetish hits, you may play this again.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-METRONOME_CARD.title: Metronome
HYPNOSISCREATOR-GAZE_LIGHT.title: Gaze Light
HYPNOSISCREATOR-DISCIPLINE.title: Discipline
HYPNOSISCREATOR-STARE.title: Stare
HYPNOSISCREATOR-KICK.title: Kick
HYPNOSISCREATOR-KICK.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Awaken SM and DomSub.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-PETTING.title: Petting
HYPNOSISCREATOR-WHISPER.title: Whisper
HYPNOSISCREATOR-WHISPER.description: Choose {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold]. Awaken their fetishes on the target.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-WHISPER.selectionScreenP: Choose a card to awaken fetishes from.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SOFT_TECHNIQUE.title: Soft Technique
HYPNOSISCREATOR-DONT_MOVE.title: Don't Move!
HYPNOSISCREATOR-GOOD.title: Good!
HYPNOSISCREATOR-GOOD.description: Good girl. Choose [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Exhausted[/gold] card and put it into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
HYPNOSISCREATOR-GOOD.selectionScreenProm: Choose a card to put into your hand.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-KNEEL.title: Kneel
HYPNOSISCREATOR-LOOK.title: Look
HYPNOSISCREATOR-COME.title: Come
HYPNOSISCREATOR-COME.description: Come here. Pull the target and awaken DomSub.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-RELAX.title: Relax
HYPNOSISCREATOR-PRESENT.title: Present
HYPNOSISCREATOR-TRANCE.title: Trance
HYPNOSISCREATOR-CRAWL.title: Crawl
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ROLL.title: Roll
HYPNOSISCREATOR-CUM.title: Cum
HYPNOSISCREATOR-HYPNOSIS_INTRO.title: Hypnosis Intro
HYPNOSISCREATOR-HYPNOSIS_INTRO.descripti: Draw {Draw:diff()} {Draw:plural:card|cards}. Each time you play this on the same opponent, draw [blue]1[/blue] fewer.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-CONTINUOUS_TRANCE.title: Continuous Trance
HYPNOSISCREATOR-CONTINUOUS_TRANCE.descri: Apply {Trance:diff()} [gold]Trance[/gold] and {BogPower:diff()} [gold]Bog[/gold], and awaken the [gold]Trance[/gold] Fetish.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ABDOMINAL_STRIKE.title: Abdominal Strike
HYPNOSISCREATOR-TINGSHA.title: Tingsha
HYPNOSISCREATOR-TINGSHA.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL opponents. Return this to your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Apply {Trance:diff()} [gold]Trance[/gold].
HYPNOSISCREATOR-FINGER_COUNT.title: Finger Count
HYPNOSISCREATOR-FINGER_COUNT.description: Gain {RegenPower:diff()} [gold]Regen[/gold]. Reduce the cost of all [gold]Count[/gold] cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] by [blue]1[/blue].
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SENSE_SHARE.title: Sense Share
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SENSE_SHARE.description: This turn, single-target [gold]Attack[/gold] cards hit ALL opponents.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-CAN_DO_IT.title: You Can Do It
HYPNOSISCREATOR-MENTAL_CARE.title: Mental Care
HYPNOSISCREATOR-MENTAL_CARE.description: Remove all debuffs except [gold]Doom[/gold] from the target. Gain {BlockPerType:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] per debuff type removed. Apply {BogPower:diff()} [gold]Bog[/gold].
HYPNOSISCREATOR-PUNISHMENT.title: Punishment
HYPNOSISCREATOR-PUNISHMENT.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each time the target attacked you this combat.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ERICKSONIAN.title: Ericksonian Suggestion
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ERICKSONIAN.description: Whenever you land a Fetish hit, advance [gold]Count[/gold] on cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
HYPNOSISCREATOR-OVER_FOCUS.title: Over Focus
HYPNOSISCREATOR-BOTTOMLESS_BOG.title: Bottomless Bog
HYPNOSISCREATOR-BOTTOMLESS_BOG.descripti: At the end of your turn, apply [gold]Doom[/gold] equal to {DoomPerStack:diff()} × ([gold]Trance[/gold] + [gold]Bog[/gold]) to ALL enemies.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-RITUAL_REVEAL.title: Ritual Reveal
HYPNOSISCREATOR-RITUAL_REVEAL.descriptio: Add [blue]2[/blue] random Hypnosis [gold]Count[/gold] cards from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. [blue]1[/blue] of them prefers a card matching the target's fetish.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ZERO_SHORTCUT.title: Zero Shortcut
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ZERO_SHORTCUT.descriptio: Gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold], then reduce by [blue]1[/blue] each time until you gain [blue]0[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold]. Set the cost of Hypnosis [gold]Count[/gold] cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] to [blue]0[/blue]. (Total {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold])
HYPNOSISCREATOR-INFINITE_FINGER_SNAP.des: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL opponents [blue]5[/blue] times. Do this X times.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-FETISH_CHAMPION.title: Fetish Champion
HYPNOSISCREATOR-FETISH_CHAMPION.descript: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage once for each fetish the target has.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-KNOW_IT_ALL.title: I Know It All
HYPNOSISCREATOR-KNOW_IT_ALL.description: Effects from Fetish hits are doubled.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-TOTAL_CONTROL.title: Total Control
HYPNOSISCREATOR-TOTAL_CONTROL.descriptio: Playable only if the target has at least [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Trance[/gold]. This turn, all attack damage is redirected to you.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-HEART_GOUGE.title: Heart Gouge
HYPNOSISCREATOR-HEART_GOUGE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If Fatal, gain an extra Relic reward.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-BARE_INSTINCT.title: Bare Instinct
HYPNOSISCREATOR-BARE_INSTINCT.descriptio: At the start of your turn, [gold]Enchant[/gold] {Enchant:diff()} random [gold]Attack[/gold] {Enchant:plural:card|cards} in your [gold]Hand[/gold] with Instinct.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ASMR_HYPNOSIS.title: ASMR Hypnosis
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ASMR_HYPNOSIS.descriptio: Players are assigned Left/Right. Whenever play alternates sides, apply {Doom:diff()} [gold]Doom[/gold] to the target.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SLIME_HYPNOSIS.title: Slime Hypnosis
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SLIME_HYPNOSIS.descripti: For [blue]1[/blue] turn, transform the target into a random slime and overwrite their intent to add {Slimed:diff()} [gold]Slimed[/gold]. Apply {Trance:diff()} [gold]Trance[/gold].
HYPNOSISCREATOR-COGNITIVE_SHUFFLE.title: Cognitive Shuffle
HYPNOSISCREATOR-COGNITIVE_SHUFFLE.descri: Apply {Trance:diff()} [gold]Trance[/gold]. Choose 1 of [blue]3[/blue] character cards and gain that character's [blue]3[/blue]-cost [gold]Power[/gold] effect. At the start of your turn, generate {Cards:diff()} random matching {Cards:plural:card|cards} that cost [blue]0[/blue] this turn. Continues while the target has [gold]Trance[/gold].
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ALL_IN_ONE.title: All In One
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ALL_IN_ONE.description: Play every Hypnosis [gold]Count[/gold] card on the target. Apply {Trance:diff()} [gold]Trance[/gold].
After {Turns:diff()} turns, their heart stops. Doubled against bosses. Stacking advances Cardiac Arrest by [blue]1[/blue] turn. Apply {Trance:diff()} [gold]Trance[/gold].
HYPNOSISCREATOR-TIME_STOP_STRIKE.title: Time Stop Strike
HYPNOSISCREATOR-TIME_STOP_STRIKE.descrip: Playable only if the target has [gold]Trance[/gold]. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage at the end of your turn. Playable up to [blue]3[/blue] times per turn.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ABNORMAL_TRANSFORM.title: Invitation to Abnormal
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ABNORMAL_TRANSFORM.descr: Choose up to X cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] and transform them into random Abnormal-named cards from other characters. Those cards are treated as Abnormal. They cost [blue]0[/blue] this turn.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ABNORMAL_TRANSFORM.selec: Choose cards to transform (you may confirm with fewer than the maximum).
HYPNOSISCREATOR-AMBUSH_HYPNOSIS.title: Ambush Hypnosis
HYPNOSISCREATOR-AMBUSH_HYPNOSIS.descript: Draw cards equal to the number of opponents. Play each drawn card on a random opponent.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-MASS_HYPNOSIS.title: Mass Hypnosis
HYPNOSISCREATOR-RAPPORT.title: Rapport
HYPNOSISCREATOR-RAPPORT.description: Advance [gold]Count[/gold] in your [gold]Hand[/gold] by [blue]1[/blue]. At the start of your turn, if you did not attack an opponent last turn, advance [gold]Count[/gold] in your [gold]Hand[/gold] once more.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-CATALEPSY.title: Catalepsy
HYPNOSISCREATOR-STATUS_HYPNOSIS.title: Status Hypnosis
HYPNOSISCREATOR-STATUS_HYPNOSIS.descript: You can play Status and Curse cards on opponents with [gold]Trance[/gold].
HYPNOSISCREATOR-LOVE_HYPNOSIS.title: Love-Love Hypnosis
HYPNOSISCREATOR-LOVE_HYPNOSIS.descriptio: If the opponent intends to Buff, change that buff's target to you. Apply {Trance:diff()} [gold]Trance[/gold].
HYPNOSISCREATOR-CULT_LEADER.title: Cult Leader
HYPNOSISCREATOR-CULT_LEADER.description: [gold]Abnormal[/gold], [gold]DomSub[/gold], and [gold]SM[/gold] cards always hit Fetish. Whenever you apply [gold]Trance[/gold], next turn gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} and draw {Draw:diff()} {Draw:plural:card|cards}.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-KNIFE_AND_GUN.title: Knife and Gun
HYPNOSISCREATOR-KNIFE_AND_GUN.descriptio: Add [blue]1[/blue] Knife into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Awaken Abnormal.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-BRAIN_SLIME_HYPNOSIS.des: This turn, redirect the target's attacks to another opponent (never the player). Apply {Trance:diff()} [gold]Trance[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. The target loses {ConstrictPower:diff()} HP each turn. Apply {Trance:diff()} [gold]Trance[/gold].
HYPNOSISCREATOR-BLOOD_SUCK_HYPNOSIS.desc: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and heal for the unblocked damage dealt. Apply {Trance:diff()} [gold]Trance[/gold].
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SOFTEN.title: Squishy Softening
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SOFTEN.description: Enemies with [gold]Trance[/gold] deal [blue]30%[/blue] less [gold]Attack[/gold] damage per [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Trance[/gold]. Each additional copy increases this by [blue]10%[/blue].
HYPNOSISCREATOR-LULLABY_HYPNOSIS.title: Lullaby Hypnosis
HYPNOSISCREATOR-LULLABY_HYPNOSIS.descrip: Apply {AsleepPower:diff()} [gold]Asleep[/gold]. Heal the target for {Heal:diff()} HP. Apply {Trance:diff()} [gold]Trance[/gold].
HYPNOSISCREATOR-MASTERY.title: Mastery
HYPNOSISCREATOR-MASTERY.description: At the end of combat, upgrade every Hypnosis [gold]Count[/gold] card you played.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-MELT_INTO_TRANCE.title: Melt Into Trance
HYPNOSISCREATOR-MELT_INTO_TRANCE.descrip: Deal damage equal to {PerTrance:diff()} × the number of times the target has fallen into [gold]Trance[/gold].
HYPNOSISCREATOR-CORROSION.title: Corrosion
HYPNOSISCREATOR-CORROSION.description: Whenever you play an [gold]Attack[/gold], add [blue]1[/blue] random Hypnosis [gold]Count[/gold] card into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
HYPNOSISCREATOR-TENTACLE_RECALL.title: Tentacle Recall
HYPNOSISCREATOR-TENTACLE_RECALL.descript: Apply {ConstrictPower:diff()} [gold]Constrict[/gold]. Next turn, add a copy of this card into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
The target loses {LoseHp:diff()} HP. Apply {Trance:diff()} [gold]Trance[/gold]. This card can be upgraded infinitely.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-TRAINING_COMMAND_CARD.de: Add {Cards:diff()} random DomSub Training Command {Cards:plural:card|cards} into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
HYPNOSISCREATOR-AUTOPSY.title: Autopsy
HYPNOSISCREATOR-AUTOPSY.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Deal additional {PerHeart:diff()} damage for each Heart relic you have. If Fatal, gain an extra Relic reward.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-HUNDRED_EIGHT.title: 108 Earthly Desires
HYPNOSISCREATOR-HUNDRED_EIGHT.descriptio: Awaken every fetish on ALL opponents. After play, this card's cost increases by [blue]1[/blue]. When you play this card at cost [blue]3[/blue], deal {Damage:diff()} damage [blue]108[/blue] times to ALL opponents and [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
HYPNOSISCREATOR-FUDO_MYOO.title: Fudo Myo-o
HYPNOSISCREATOR-FUDO_MYOO.description: Remove all debuffs and gain {ArtifactPower:diff()} [gold]Artifact[/gold]. Whenever an opponent applies a debuff to you, deal {FudoMyooPower:diff()} damage to them.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-BABY_HYPNOSIS.title: Baby Hypnosis
HYPNOSISCREATOR-BABY_HYPNOSIS.descriptio: Remove all buffs from the target. Apply {ShrinkPower:diff()} [gold]Shrink[/gold] and {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold]. Apply {Trance:diff()} [gold]Trance[/gold].
HYPNOSISCREATOR-WORD_FLOOD.title: Word Flood
HYPNOSISCREATOR-WORD_FLOOD.description: Whenever you play a Hypnosis [gold]Count[/gold] card, draw {Draw:diff()} {Draw:plural:card|cards}.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SUGGESTION_RELEASE.title: Suggestion Release
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SUGGESTION_RELEASE.descr: Remove all [gold]Trance[/gold] from the target. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} equal to the amount removed.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-AS_YOU_WISH.title: As You Wish, Master
HYPNOSISCREATOR-AS_YOU_WISH.description: Whenever you play a Fetish card, gain a bonus based on its fetish: Abnormal grants [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] (and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold] if upgraded), SM grants [gold]Vigor[/gold], DomSub grants [gold]Block[/gold].
HYPNOSISCREATOR-FETISH_UNDERSTANDING.des: Whenever you play a Fetish card, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
HYPNOSISCREATOR-PROSELYTIZE.title: Proselytizing Urge
HYPNOSISCREATOR-PROSELYTIZE.description: Apply {OshiActivityPower:diff()} [gold]Oshi Activity[/gold] and {BogPower:diff()} [gold]Bog[/gold]. At the end of combat, gain {Gold:diff()} Gold as a reward.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SELF_SUGGESTION.title: Self-Suggestion
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SELF_SUGGESTION.descript: Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold]. Gain {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold]. Obtain [blue]3[/blue] random Heart relics this combat.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-HEART_CRAVING.title: Craving for Hearts
HYPNOSISCREATOR-HEART_CRAVING.descriptio: Your spent Rare Heart relics become reusable for this combat only.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-WAIT_A_BIT_MORE.title: Just a Little Longer
HYPNOSISCREATOR-WAIT_A_BIT_MORE.descript: Choose {Cards:diff()} Hypnosis [gold]Count[/gold] {Cards:plural:card|cards}. Reset their cost to base and grant [gold]Replay[/gold] [blue]1[/blue].
HYPNOSISCREATOR-MARSHMALLOW_ANSWER.title: Marshmallow Answer
HYPNOSISCREATOR-MARSHMALLOW_ANSWER.descr: Add {Cards:diff()} random Curse {Cards:plural:card|cards} into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. If an opponent intends to Attack, overwrite that move to gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and apply {BogPower:diff()} [gold]Bog[/gold].
HYPNOSISCREATOR-PERVERSION_TRUE_DESIRE.d: Deal damage equal to your missing HP.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-COLLAR_TRAINING.title: Collar and Training
HYPNOSISCREATOR-COLLAR_TRAINING.descript: Pull the target. If they were already Pulled, apply {Doom:diff()} [gold]Doom[/gold] and awaken DomSub.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-VITAL_POINT.title: Strike at the Vital Point
HYPNOSISCREATOR-VITAL_POINT.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage, plus {PerTurn:diff()} for each turn this combat you have not played an [gold]Attack[/gold].
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ACCEPTANCE_NEED.title: Need for Acceptance
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ACCEPTANCE_NEED.descript: Whenever you take attack damage, remember it. At the start of your next turn, gain energy and draw cards equal to hits taken times this power's stacks.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-MEET_EXPECTATIONS.title: Meeting Expectations
HYPNOSISCREATOR-MEET_EXPECTATIONS.descri: Deal damage equal to the square of (total cost of Hypnosis [gold]Count[/gold] cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] + [blue]1[/blue]), then reduce their cost by [blue]1[/blue].
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ENCORE.title: Encore
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ENCORE.description: Whenever a [gold]Count[/gold] card would [gold]Exhaust[/gold], return it to your [gold]Hand[/gold] at its base cost.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-HEARTBEAT_SHARE.title: Sharing a Heartbeat
HYPNOSISCREATOR-HEARTBEAT_SHARE.descript: Trigger the right-click effects of your Rare Heart relics shared with [blue]1[/blue] ally player.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-FETISH_PARTY.title: Fetish Party Night
HYPNOSISCREATOR-FETISH_PARTY.description: Add {Cards:diff()} random Fetish {Cards:plural:card|cards} into every ally's [gold]Hand[/gold].
HYPNOSISCREATOR-FREE_HUG.title: Free Hug
HYPNOSISCREATOR-FREE_HUG.description: Pull the target. If they were already Pulled, apply {Doom:diff()} [gold]Doom[/gold] and {BogPower:diff()} [gold]Bog[/gold], then pass {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} to a random ally.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-KNIFE.title: Knife
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ABNORMAL_SLIME.title: Slimed
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ABNORMAL_BURN.title: Burn
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ABNORMAL_WOUND.title: Wound
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ABNORMAL_WITHER.title: Wither
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ABNORMAL_WITHER.descript: Reset the target's Withering Presence stacks. Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-INFECT.title: Infect
HYPNOSISCREATOR-INFECT.description: Choose [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Attack[/gold] in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. [gold]Enchant[/gold] it with Parasite.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-INFECT.selectionScreenPr: Choose an Attack to enchant with Parasite.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-UNCONSCIOUS_GUIDANCE.des: Whenever an opponent attacks, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] before the hit.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-CHEER_FROM_THE_ABYSS.des: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Whenever you kill someone with [gold]Doom[/gold], permanently increase this card's [gold]Block[/gold] in your deck by {Increase:diff()}.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SOOT_STATUS.title: Soot
HYPNOSISCREATOR-DAZED_STATUS.title: Dazed
HYPNOSISCREATOR-VOID_STATUS.title: Void
HYPNOSISCREATOR-DEBRIS_STATUS.title: Debris
HYPNOSISCREATOR-FRANTIC_ESCAPE_STATUS.de: Push the enemy away. Increase [gold]Sandpit[/gold] by [blue]1[/blue]. This card costs [blue]1[/blue] more.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-TOXIC_STATUS.title: Toxic
HYPNOSISCREATOR-BECKON_STATUS.title: Beckon
HYPNOSISCREATOR-INJURY_CURSE.title: Injury
HYPNOSISCREATOR-GREED_CURSE.title: Greed
HYPNOSISCREATOR-DOUBT_CURSE.title: Doubt
HYPNOSISCREATOR-WRITHE_CURSE.title: Writhe
HYPNOSISCREATOR-FOLLY_CURSE.title: Folly
HYPNOSISCREATOR-REGRET_CURSE.title: Regret
HYPNOSISCREATOR-REGRET_CURSE.description: The enemy loses [blue]1[/blue] HP for each card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
HYPNOSISCREATOR-GUILTY_CURSE.title: Guilt
HYPNOSISCREATOR-GUILTY_CURSE.description: Removed from your deck after {Combats:diff()} combat(s).
HYPNOSISCREATOR-POOR_SLEEP_CURSE.title: Poor Sleep
HYPNOSISCREATOR-POOR_SLEEP_CURSE.descrip: At the start of your next turn, apply {AsleepPower:diff()} [gold]Asleep[/gold].
HYPNOSISCREATOR-BAD_LUCK_CURSE.title: Bad Luck
HYPNOSISCREATOR-BAD_LUCK_CURSE.descripti: The enemy loses HP equal to {HpLoss:diff()}% of their Max HP.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-CLUMSY_CURSE.title: Clumsy
HYPNOSISCREATOR-DECAY_CURSE.title: Decay
HYPNOSISCREATOR-DEBT_CURSE.title: Debt
HYPNOSISCREATOR-DEBT_CURSE.description: At the end of combat, gain {Gold:diff()} Gold as a reward.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-NORMALITY_CURSE.title: Normality
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SHAME_CURSE.title: Shame
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SPORE_MIND_CURSE.title: Spore Mind
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ENTHRALLED_CURSE.title: Enthralled
